issues.description: Trigger is 'OnPlay' but condition checks for Leader on board. Should verify Leader type as part of condition, not just presence.
Condition should be 'LeaderHasAnyType' with types ["FILM", "Straw Hat Crew"], not 'HasCardOnBoard' for Leader. Current condition is semantically wrong.

Action type is 'GiveDon' but effect text says 'set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active' - this means activating DON cards, not giving them. Should be 'AttachDon' or a Don activation mechanic, not 'GiveDon'.
Trigger is 'Activated' but effect text says '[End of Your Turn]'. Should be 'EndOfTurn'.
Action is 'Rest' but effect says 'Set this Character as active' - these are opposite states. Should be a no-op or implicit, not 'Rest'.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] If your Leader has the {FILM} or {Straw Hat Crew} type, set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.
[End of Your Turn] Set this Character as active.
